##NAMES=Congolite
##RRUFFID=R110153

##LOCALITY=Potash Corporation of Saskatchewan mine, Penobsquis, Kings County, New Brunswick, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Donald M Doell and Brian Roulston
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless cubes, extracted by dissolving the matrix of sylvite/halite, associated with strontioginorite R110149, howlite R110150, volkovskite R110151, ruitenbergite R110152, and hilgardite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R110153
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 8.606 b: 8.606 c: 21.088 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 120 volume: 1352.6 crystal system: hexagonal
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
